name: testOpenCurrencyDropdown
description: The 'Currency' dropdown toggles and contains options All, USD, EUR.
descriptionHtml: The 'Currency' dropdown toggles and contains options All, USD, EUR.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: The 'Currency' dropdown toggles and contains options All, USD, EUR.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: The 'Currency' dropdown toggles and contains options All, USD, EUR.
